sources.excerpt: Official Casa Tequila Bar & Grill site identifies the Lorton restaurant and provides the restaurant navigation.
Official contact page identifies 9020 Lorton Station Blvd, Lorton, VA 22079.
Official Lorton food menu exposes Lunch Menu and Main Menu surfaces and item names/descriptions; it also labels a separate Catering Menu.
Restaurant-linked Toast ordering page is scoped to Casa Tequila Bar & Grill at 9020 Lorton Station Blvd, Lorton.
Targeted web search found official menu and contact pages but no official allergen matrix, nutrition document, or ingredient-allergen chart.

attempts.outcome: no allergen, nutrition, ingredient PDF or matrix found
menu ordering available; no official allergen matrix found

restaurantLevelAllergenEvidence.excerpt: Official menu provides a general raw/undercooked food warning but no restaurant-level allergen or cross-contact statement.
